prediction.reasoning: For a 3-day prediction of SCHW, I used a random walk model assuming daily volatility of approximately 1.5-2%. The point estimate remains at current price reflecting efficient market hypothesis. Confidence intervals widen with higher confidence levels, with 50% CI showing ~1.3% range, 80% CI showing ~4.3% range, and 90% CI showing ~6.2% range around current price.
